444:   // Load published pooja products from Supabase and merge with static mock products
445:   const loadPublishedProducts = async () => {
446:     try {
447:       const { data, error } = await supabase
448:         .from('website_pooja_products')
449:         .select('*')
450:         .eq('is_published', true)
451:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
452: 
453:       if (error) throw error;
454:       if (data) {
455:         const mappedData: Product[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
456:           id: item.id,
457:           name: item.name,
458:           description: item.description,
459:           price: typeof item.price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.price) : item.price,
460:           originalPrice: item.original_price ? (typeof item.original_price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.original_price) : item.original_price) : undefined,
461:           rating: typeof item.rating === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.rating) : (item.rating || 5.0),
462:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count || 0,
463:           image: item.image || '📿',
464:           category: item.category,
465:           inStock: item.in_stock ?? true,
466:           benefits: item.benefits || [],
467:           popularity: item.popularity || 80,
468:           spiritualType: item.spiritual_type || 'Rituals',
469:           // custom fields to keep compatibility with PoojaProduct:
470:           sanskritName: item.sanskrit_name,
471:           shortName: item.short_name,
472:           slug: item.slug,
473:           su
<truncated 900 bytes>
imonials: item.testimonials || [],

494:           seoTitle: item.seo_title,
495:           seoDescription: item.seo_description,
496:           canonicalUrl: item.canonical_url,
497:           ogData: item.og_data || { title: '', description: '', image: '' },

499:           imageAlt: item.image_alt,
